javadoc_before: /** * Returns the set of accepted strings, assuming that at most * limit strings are accepted. If more than limit * strings are accepted, the first limit strings found are returned. If limit<0, then * the limit is infinite. */
javadoc_after: /** Returns the set of accepted strings, up to at most * limit strings. If more than limit * strings are accepted, the first limit strings found are returned. If limit == -1, then * the limit is infinite. If the {@link Automaton} has * cycles then this method might throw {@code * IllegalArgumentException} but that is not guaranteed * when the limit is set. */
